calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-065 bias-scale 5-10x sweep: MECH-313/314/320 calibration vs F-term
items.note: Follow-up to EXQ-571 diagnosis (F dominates 88-89%%, bias_fraction~0). Sweep noise_floor_alpha (MECH-313) and bias_scale (MECH-314/320) at 1x/5x/10x individually and combined. PASS if any arm > ARM_0 + 0.05 entropy.
